Analyze content without persisting to database.

This endpoint is designed for evaluating rewritten/imitated articles
against the same quality standards as入库 articles, without saving
the article or analysis results.

SSE endpoint — streams workflow events from Redis pub/sub.

post.description: Retry a failed workflow by creating a new run with the same input.

get.description:
Get available markdown themes for WeChat MP publishing.

Returns:
    Dictionary mapping theme names to descriptions.

post.description:
Upload cover image for draft.

Processes the image (resize to 900x500, compress),
uploads to Qiniu OSS for permanent storage,
uploads to WeChat MP for thumb_media_id,
and saves both to the draft.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    id: Draft ID
    file: Image file to upload

Returns:
    CoverUploadResponse with cover_image_url and thumb_media_id

Raises:
    HTTPException: If draft not found, image processing fails,
                  or WeChat MP upload fails
Rewrite selected text using EditorAgent (synchronous — user waits for result).

Preview draft content as WeChat MP compatible HTML.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    id: Draft ID
    theme: Theme to use for styling. Options: qing-mo, github-markdown, github-markdown-light, github-markdown-dark, etc.

Publish draft to WeChat MP.

Requires confirmed=True to proceed with publishing.
Creates a PublishHistory record to track the publish attempt.

get.description: List publish history with optional status filter.

Check publish status from WeChat MP API and update local record.

If the publish history has a publish_id, queries WeChat MP API for
the latest status and updates the local record accordingly.

delete.description: Delete an external reference (admin only, cannot delete if referenced).

get.description: Get today's token usage statistics.
Get yesterday's token usage statistics.

Get time-series trend data for token usage.

Args:
    days: Number of days to include (1-90, default 7)
    agent_config_id: Optional filter by specific agent

Get aggregated token stats for agents within a date range.

Args:
    start_date: Start date (inclusive), defaults to 7 days ago
    end_date: End date (inclusive), defaults to today
    agent_config_id: Optional filter by specific agent

Get token stats for a specific agent.

Args:
    agent_id: UUID of the agent configuration
    start_date: Start date (inclusive), defaults to 7 days ago
    end_date: End date (inclusive), defaults to today
